introSection: Psycho Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at California's Great America in Santa Clara, California, USA. It was built by Arrow Dynamics and opened on March 24, 2001. Like all Wild Mouse coasters, this ride features small hairpin curves and strong lateral g-forces. The ride's track and supports were engineered by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Psycho Mouse is a standard wild mouse roller coaster from Arrow Dynamics, similar to Mad Mouse at Michigan's Adventure.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: For the 2021 season, Psycho Mouse was repainted with green track and brown supports. It used to feature yellow track with green supports.

fullText:
Psycho Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at California's Great America in Santa Clara, California, USA. It was built by Arrow Dynamics and opened on March 24, 2001. Like all Wild Mouse coasters, this ride features small hairpin curves and strong lateral g-forces. The ride's track and supports were engineered by Ride Centerline.

Psycho Mouse opened on March 24, 2001.

Psycho Mouse is a standard wild mouse roller coaster from Arrow Dynamics, similar to Mad Mouse at Michigan's Adventure.

For the 2021 season, Psycho Mouse was repainted with green track and brown supports. It used to feature yellow track with green supports.
